title: PM Schema V2 UI Gantt Layer Comparison Decision
objective: Compare the deferred Gantt candidates against real PM dependency requirements and recommend the smallest viable PM schedule visualization direction without implementing runtime code, ratifying the full frontend stack, reopening PM schema design, or bypassing the governed mutation and P6 boundary rules.
active_role: PM UI Gantt Layer Evaluation Architect
constrained_outputs: One planning handoff note comparing Syncfusion, DHTMLX, and Frappe Gantt against real PM scheduling needs
One explicit evaluation rubric covering dependencies, lag handling, baselines, interaction complexity, licensing, and bounded implementation risk
One recommendation classifying each candidate as approved-for-prototype, deferred, or not recommended
One smallest next packet recommendation after the Gantt layer decision lands
validation_steps: Confirm packet UI-002 remains bounded to planning and comparison only and does not implement runtime code, routes, or UI components
Confirm the packet evaluates only the Gantt layer and does not silently ratify the broader frontend stack
Confirm the packet preserves the governed mutation seam and P6 boundary rather than inventing direct schedule-write assumptions
Confirm the packet ends with a bounded recommendation rather than an unconstrained Gantt build-out plan
sql_permission_note: Planning only. Packet UI-002 does not authorize PM schema changes, runtime Gantt implementation, direct schedule-write paths, or final stack ratification.
